name: Belgian Dark Chocolate
tagline: Premium Belgian cocoa in a rich, indulgent tub.
description: Crafted with premium Belgian dark chocolate, this signature tub delivers deep cocoa intensity and a velvety smooth finish — Havmor's most indulgent creation.

category.name: Signature Tubs
category.description: Big, shareable tubs made for birthdays, celebrations, and family table moments. Rich flavours in generous portions.

name: Kesar Pista
tagline: Royal saffron and pistachio — a festive Indian classic.
description: A premium ice cream crafted with real pistachio nuts (2.9%), cardamom, and nature-identical saffron flavouring — rich, aromatic, and perfect for celebrations.

category.name: Indian Classics
category.description: Traditional recipes reimagined — Kesar Pista, Rajwadi Kulfi Falooda, and other desi favourites.

name: Mahabaleshwar Strawberry
tagline: Sun-ripened strawberries from the hills of Mahabaleshwar.
description: A classic Havmor favourite — creamy strawberry ice cream made with 16% processed Mahabaleshwar strawberry fruit for a naturally sweet, vibrant finish.

category.name: Fruit Flavours
category.description: Bright, real-fruit scoops bursting with tropical freshness — from Mahabaleshwar Strawberry to Wild Berries.

name: Rajwadi Kulfi Falooda
tagline: Creamy kulfi meets falooda with almonds, cashews & saffron.
description: Experience the luxurious flavor of Rajwadi Kulfi Falooda — a creamy blend of kulfi and falooda, infused with the richness of almonds, cashews, pistachios and the true flavour of saffron.

category.name: Indian Classics
category.description: Traditional recipes reimagined — Kesar Pista, Rajwadi Kulfi Falooda, and other desi favourites.

name: Wild Berries
tagline: A real fruit explosion of strawberries, blueberries & raspberries.
description: Indulge in a real fruit explosion with Wild Berries BlockBuster! Made with real strawberries and bursting with the flavors of blueberries and raspberries — a wild ride of taste that elevates your senses.

category.name: Fruit Flavours
category.description: Bright, real-fruit scoops bursting with tropical freshness — from Mahabaleshwar Strawberry to Wild Berries.

name: Zulubar Dark Crunch
tagline: Rich dark chocolate with a satisfying almond crunch.
description: Get ready to indulge in the darkness with the irresistible Zulubar Dark Crunch — the perfect combination of rich dark chocolate flavours and satisfying crunch with the goodness of almonds.

category.name: Bars & Cones
category.description: On-the-go indulgence — crunchy cones, coated bars, and stick treats for every mood and moment.

name: Biscotti
tagline: Italian-inspired biscuit and cream in a celebration tub.
description: A sophisticated tub flavour inspired by Italian biscotti — creamy ice cream with biscuit pieces and a buttery, caramelised finish that pairs beautifully with any celebration.

category.name: Signature Tubs
category.description: Big, shareable tubs made for birthdays, celebrations, and family table moments. Rich flavours in generous portions.

name: Choco Berry Krunch
tagline: Dark chocolate meets berry in a crunchy coated bar.
description: A bold combination of rich chocolate and tangy berry ice cream, coated in a crispy compound shell — the perfect balance of sweet and tart in every bite.

category.name: Bars & Cones
category.description: On-the-go indulgence — crunchy cones, coated bars, and stick treats for every mood and moment.
